name: Union-Find transitive A-B-C bridge
description: Legacy DSU.union merged A↔B (cos 0.85) and B↔C (cos 0.83) into one component even though A↔C cos = 0.55. The bridging post B was a generic '여야 충돌' headline that semantically straddled topic A (예산안) and topic C (특검법). v8 keeps them separate because B's embedding does not actually exceed 0.78 against either A or C — the legacy bridge was an IDF false positive, not a true cosine bridge. This fixture pins the post-embedding-era expectation: B sits closer to topic C than A, but neither edge crosses 0.78.

posts.title: 특검법 통과 후폭풍, 대통령실 거부권 시사
